notes: Settings tidy-up and a couple of fixes: page-refresh options moved to General ▸ Startup (next to "Clear every page on leave"), the "Pages to refresh" Done button no longer hides under the navigation bar, and Bosses & Events now credits its images to © ArenaNet, via the Guild Wars 2 Wiki. Tyrian Vault is in closed beta — join at medephiststudios.com/join-beta.html.
